enum_values.name: BuiltIn
enum_values.summary: Type for things that Dynamo ships with (operator, geometries...)

enum_values.name: CustomNode
enum_values.summary: Type for all the DYFs (both loose DYF files and packaged)

enum_values.name: Packaged
enum_values.summary: Type for a packaged element (either zero-touch DLLs or DYFs)

enum_values.name: ZeroTouch
enum_values.summary: Type for all the DLLs (can be built-in, third-party, and packaged)
